installCommand: cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.15.0 --activate && pnpm install
buildCommand: cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=home
ignoreCommand: cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && pnpm exec turbo-ignore home
